name: Меткий Стрелок
description: A well-placed bullet is more powerful than a sword, arrow, or spell. Indeed, you believe that every violent conflict should sound like a single loud crack followed by a long silence. Such shots demand perfection, even at range, for when they are done right, they are as deadly for the target as they are stupendous for the audience.

features.name: Eagle Eye
features.description: [Maneuver] Once per turn when you miss with a ranged attack roll, you can expend one Risk Die and add it to the attack roll, potentially causing the attack to hit.

features.name: Sharpshooter's Stance
features.description: You have trained to fire from a stable {@condition Prone|XPHB} position, granting the following conditions.

details.fireWhileProne: You don't have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on ranged attack rolls as a result of the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
details.quickStand: When you have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition, you can right yourself and thereby end the condition with only 5 feet of movement.

features.name: Concealed Position
features.description: You excel at firing from concealment, granting you the following benefits.

details.camouflage: You can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action even if you aren't {@condition Heavily Obscured|XPHB} or behind {@variantrule Three-Quarters Cover|XPHB} or {@variantrule Total Cover|XPHB}, as long as you have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. The {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition of this {@action Hide|XPHB} action ends if you don't have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
details.snipersNest: If you make an attack roll while hidden and the roll misses, making the attack roll doesn't reveal your location.

features.name: Reposition
features.description: Whenever a creature misses you with an attack roll, you can take a {@action Reaction|XPHB} to end the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition on yourself and move up to half your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.

features.name: Focused Shot
features.description: When you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action, you can choose to make only one ranged attack roll using a weapon to make a Focused Shot. You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on this attack roll and, on a hit, score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}.
